name: One Nevada Credit Union ATM
description_short: One Nevada Credit Union is a Nevada-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards to members. Access accounts through branches, ATMs, and digital banking.
description_long:
One Nevada Credit Union is a federally insured credit union (NCUA) operating in Nevada with a stated mission to make financially savvy Nevadans and build a stronger Nevada. The organization positions itself as the "Easiest Nevada Credit Union to Join" and emphasizes member-focused service over basic banking.

The credit union offers a full range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, home mortgages (30-year fixed from 6.285% APR, 15-year from 5.807% APR), auto loans (from 5.49% APR for new and used vehicles), personal lines of credit, VISA Platinum credit cards (from 11.75% APR), and promotional financing options like "No Payments for 90 Days" for qualified borrowers. They provide both in-person and online application options with instant pre-qualification tools.

One Nevada differentiates itself through competitive rates marketed as lower than national banks, low down payment mortgage options, flexible loan terms, digital banking capabilities (mobile check deposit, spending limits, account alerts), and community involvement including event sponsorships and scholarships. Their routing number is 322484401, and they maintain multiple branch and ATM locations throughout Nevada.

As a credit union, membership eligibility may apply, though the website emphasizes ease of joining. Members should verify specific eligibility requirements and that rates shown are "as low as" and vary by creditworthiness, collateral, and loan terms. Promotional rates like the 90-day payment moratorium apply only to qualified individuals financing directly with the credit union, not through dealership partners.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Federally insured by NCUA, providing deposit protection up to standard limits
Competitive mortgage rates advertised as lower than national banks (6.285% for 30-year fixed)
No-payment promotional periods (90 days) available for qualified borrowers
Digital banking features including mobile check deposit and spending limit controls
Full-service credit union with mortgages, auto loans, credit cards, and lines of credit all in one institution
Online pre-qualification tool allows rate comparison without affecting credit score
Community involvement through sponsorships and scholarship programs
cons: Membership eligibility requirements may apply (website does not fully detail who can join)
All rates shown are "as low as" and vary significantly by credit score, collateral, and loan terms
Promotional financing terms (like 90-day deferrals) may not apply when financing through dealership partners
Limited transparency on specific membership fees, account minimums, or overdraft policies on the homepage
APRs can increase after loan origination if loan terms permit, according to fine print
best_for: Nevada residents seeking lower rates than national banks on mortgages and auto loans
Credit union members wanting full-service banking (checking, savings, credit cards, loans) from one institution
Borrowers needing payment flexibility and willing to take advantage of promotional financing terms
Consumers prioritizing digital banking options and avoiding frequent branch visits
diagnosis: One Nevada Credit Union is best for Nevada residents who qualify for membership and seek competitive rates on mortgages, auto loans, and other credit products with the convenience of full-service banking and digital access. Primary caveat: all advertised rates are minimums based on creditworthiness and loan factors, and actual terms will vary; prospective members should verify membership eligibility requirements upfront.
services: Checking accounts with spending controls and account alerts
Savings accounts and certificate of deposit (CD) products
Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Digital banking with mobile app and remote check deposit
Promotional financing (90-day payment deferrals for qualified borrowers)
Multiple branch and ATM locations across Nevada
Insurance comparison and management tools (auto and home insurance)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2020 W Craig Rd, North Las Vegas, NV 89031
